entities.name: Social accountability
entities.context: Core belief that accountability works through social/relational mechanisms rather than functional UI

entities.name: Anthropomorphic friction
entities.context: Novel framework: perceived persona activates social circuits, creating guilt/obligation that drives habit compliance

entities.name: Relational interfaces
entities.context: Proposed design paradigm moving away from frictionless UI toward social/persona-based interactions

entities.name: Social reciprocity
entities.context: Underlying psychological principle—humans are wired for tribal accountability and social debt

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; coaching interventions should use social AI channels over portal/app delivery

relationships.context: Anthropomorphic friction is the mechanism that makes social accountability effective in digital products
Social reciprocity is the psychological foundation that anthropomorphic friction leverages
Relational interfaces are the design implementation of anthropomorphic friction principles
Careerspan coaching should be delivered via social AI channels rather than standard UI for higher adherence
